episode_theme: Eleanor enters Blackwood Estate under Mrs. Cross' scrutiny

scenes.scene_purpose: Introduce Mrs. Cross as antagonist and force Eleanor to assert control.

beats.description: Mrs. Cross materializes silently, forcing Eleanor to confront the house rules.
beats.goal: Eleanor needs cooperation from the staff.
beats.conflict: Mrs. Cross exerts authority and hostility.
beats.turn: Eleanor realizes she must assert herself.
beats.visual: Chiaroscuro hallway where Mrs. Cross emerges from black void as Eleanor spins in shock.
beats.character_action: Eleanor pivots to confront Mrs. Cross and refuses to yield ground.
beats.revelation: Mrs. Cross is both gatekeeper and antagonist.

shots.nano_prompt: Medium shot as the governess spins to face the housekeeper emerging silently from a side hall, both carved by a slash of light.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Snap zoom retract reveals the reprimand "You were not invited to wander" freezing the governess mid-step.
shots.dialogue: Mrs. Cross: "You were not invited to wander."
shots.dialogue_subtext: She asserts total control over the space without raising her voice.
shots.lighting: Hard chiaroscuro slash across Mrs. Cross
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor foreground, Mrs. Cross emerging from hallway
shots.description: CAM: 35mm medium as housekeeper emerges from side hall, governess spinning foreground. REF: Eleanor Vance, Mrs. Cross. LIGHT: hard chiaroscuro slash isolating both faces. BLOCK: Eleanor foreground profile, Mrs. Cross materializing from void.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from scene BW_EP1_003 cold open and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_002B.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 35mm snap zoom retract at action start, honoring Eleanor foreground grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor foreground, Mrs. Cross emerging from hallway locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Close-up on the governess regaining composure, eyes locked while the housekeeper blurs in the background.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Static duel as she replies "Then provide me a lamp and I will keep to my work" using impeccable diction to reclaim control.
shots.dialogue: Eleanor: "Then provide me a lamp and I will keep to my work."
shots.dialogue_subtext: She counters authority with politeness weaponized as control.
shots.lighting: Sharp key only on Eleanor, darkness behind Mrs. Cross
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor in focus, Mrs. Cross blurred behind
shots.description: CAM: locked 65mm close-up on governess reclaiming composure while housekeeper blurs behind. REF: Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: sharp key on Eleanor, darkness enveloping background. BLOCK: Eleanor center frame, Mrs. Cross defocused over shoulder.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_001A and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_003C.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 65mm locked duel close-up at action start, honoring Eleanor in focus grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor in focus, Mrs. Cross blurred behind locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Macro insert on the housekeeper's gloved hands gripping the brass lamp key with the governess reflected in the polished surface.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Macro hold while the whispered threat binds her to silence before the key is reluctantly offered.
shots.lens_specs: extreme shallow DOF on key and reflection
shots.lighting: Single slit of light across key, surrounding darkness
shots.character_blocking: Hands and reflection sharing frame diagonals
shots.description: CAM: 90mm macro insert on housekeeper gloves gripping brass lamp key with governess reflection. REF: Mrs. Cross, Eleanor Vance. LIGHT: single slit across key, surrounding darkness. BLOCK: diagonal composition with hands and reflection.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_002B and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_004D.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 90mm macro locked off at action start, honoring Hands and reflection sharing frame diagonals grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Hands and reflection sharing frame diagonals locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Over-shoulder from the housekeeper towering over the governess as the hallway stretches into darkness.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Slow push from the housekeeper's POV while she cites Mr. Blackwood's rules, forcing the governess to retreat.
shots.dialogue: Mrs. Cross: "Mr. Blackwood's rules are not open to negotiation."
shots.dialogue_subtext: She weaponizes the master's name to keep Eleanor submissive.
shots.camera: 55mm slow push over Mrs. Cross's shoulder
shots.lens_specs: medium depth keeping both figures readable
shots.lighting: Key on Eleanor, rim on Mrs. Cross
shots.character_blocking: Mrs. Cross foreground silhouette, Eleanor retreating
shots.description: CAM: 55mm over-shoulder from housekeeper towering over governess, hallway stretching into darkness. REF: Eleanor Vance, Mrs. Cross. LIGHT: key on Eleanor, rim on housekeeper silhouette. BLOCK: Mrs. Cross foreground silhouette, Eleanor retreating down hall.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_003C and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_005E.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 55mm slow push over Mrs. Cross's shoulder at action start, honoring Mrs. Cross foreground silhouette grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Mrs. Cross foreground silhouette, Eleanor retreating locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Wide two-shot with the governess and housekeeper separated by negative space amid foyer shadows.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Locked wide lingers as the governess lifts her bag and the housekeeper turns away, footsteps echoing to compel obedience.
shots.lens_specs: deep focus keeping both figures sharp
shots.character_blocking: Eleanor frame left, Mrs. Cross frame right exiting
shots.description: CAM: locked 32mm wide two-shot in foyer negative space. REF: Eleanor Vance, Mrs. Cross. LIGHT: separated gaslamp pools. BLOCK: Eleanor frame left lifting bag, Mrs. Cross frame right turning away into corridor.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_004D and hand off cleanly to BW_EP1_003_006F.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 32mm locked wide at action start, honoring Eleanor frame left grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Eleanor frame left, Mrs. Cross frame right exiting locked before cutting.

shots.nano_prompt: Medium rear shot of the governess hesitating while Mrs. Cross glides away with the lamp key raised.
shots.ltx_motion_prompt: Handheld follow as she steadies herself and steps forward, keeping the housekeeper centered while footsteps echo down the hall.
shots.lens_specs: medium depth keeping both figures readable
shots.character_blocking: Housekeeper centered ahead, governess foreground back toward camera
shots.description: CAM: handheld 45mm follow from behind governess as housekeeper glides away with lamp key raised. REF: Eleanor Vance, Mrs. Cross. LIGHT: trailing gaslamp glow fading into darkness. BLOCK: housekeeper centered ahead, governess back toward camera hesitates then steps forward.
shots.continuity_note: Match framing from BW_EP1_003_005E and hand off cleanly to scene BW_EP1_003 outro.

ltx_motion_metadata.start_pose: Camera 45mm handheld follow at action start, honoring Housekeeper centered ahead grounding.
ltx_motion_metadata.end_pose: Conclude with Housekeeper centered ahead, governess foreground back toward camera locked before cutting.

scenes.scene_guide: SCENE GUIDE: Narrow side hallway; camera aligned along corridor depth with housekeeper emerging from doorway, gaslamp pools and deep negative space.
